---
name: Contributor onboarding
about: Orientation, build friction, or unclear extension points — not a feature request
title: '[CONTRIB] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Background

Your experience level with Go / React / Meshtastic (short):

## What felt unclear

- [ ] Where to start in the repo
- [ ] How to run verification (`make …`)
- [ ] Which docs are canonical vs historical
- [ ] Safe areas to change (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Truth / governance constraints (AGENTS.md, docs/repo-os)

## What you tried

Commands and docs you followed.

## Suggested improvement

Concrete doc path, script, or README section that would have helped.
